title: Yijing Hexagram 59: Huan (Dispersion)
description: Hexagram 59 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 59 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Dispersion. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers one to cross the great water.
